steps.title: Read the boundary line
steps.content: From the graph, the boundary line has slope $4$ and y-intercept $3$, giving $y = 4x + 3$. That eliminates choices with $-3$ as the intercept.

steps.title: Determine the inequality direction
steps.content:
The shaded region is above the line, so $y > 4x + 3$.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
